# Arkova

> Privacy-first document verification platform. Creates tamper-proof cryptographic fingerprints client-side and anchors them to a permanent public network. Documents never leave the user's device.

## Description

Arkova builds infrastructure for verifiable credentials. Organizations use Arkova to issue, anchor, and verify academic degrees, professional certifications, legal documents, and any digital file. The platform serves both human users and AI agents that need machine-verifiable, tamper-proof, independently auditable records.

- Website: https://arkova.ai
- App: https://app.arkova.ai
- Contact: hello@arkova.ai
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/arkovatech

## Endpoints

Public verification (no authentication required):

- `GET https://app.arkova.ai/api/v1/verify/{publicId}` — Returns verification status: verified, status, issuer_name, credential_type, issued_date, expiry_date, anchor_timestamp, record_uri
- `POST https://app.arkova.ai/api/verify-anchor` — Accepts `{ "fingerprint": "<SHA-256 hex>" }`, returns matching record (note: no `/v1` prefix on this endpoint)

API-key required (`X-API-Key` header, obtain at https://app.arkova.ai/settings/api-keys):

- `GET https://app.arkova.ai/api/v1/verify/search?q=<query>&max_results=<n>` — Semantic search across verified credentials
- `POST https://app.arkova.ai/api/v1/verify/batch` — Batch verification by publicId
- `POST https://app.arkova.ai/api/v1/verify/entity` — Entity verification

OpenAPI spec: https://app.arkova.ai/api/docs (interactive)

## Authentication

- **API Key:** `X-API-Key` header on every request. Obtain at https://app.arkova.ai/settings/api-keys
- **OAuth 2.0:** Bearer token for enterprise integrations (Supabase JWT)
- **Public:** No auth required only on `GET /api/v1/verify/{publicId}` and `POST /api/verify-anchor`. Every other endpoint requires an API key or JWT.

## Rate Limits

| Tier | Limit |
|------|-------|
| Anonymous | 100 req/min per IP |
| Free API key | 1,000 req/min |
| Batch | 10 req/min per key |

## Tools

MCP server for AI agent access:

- **Endpoint:** `https://edge.arkova.ai/mcp`
- **Transport:** Streamable HTTP
- `verify_credential` — Verify by public_id
- `search_credentials` — Search by query with max_results
- `verify_fingerprint` — Check SHA-256 fingerprint match

## Traction

- 166,000+ credential records secured on production network
- 1,390,000+ public records indexed (SEC, USPTO, CourtListener, Federal Register, OpenStates)
- 116 anchor receipts confirmed on production network
- 100% independently verifiable via public network
- Wikidata entity: Q138865713
